title: cistus creticus var. tauricus
intro: Cistus creticus var. tauricus, also known as Rock Rose, is a Mediterranean shrub with fragrant white flowers and grayish-green leaves, belonging to the family Cistaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Rock Rose is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be found in aromatherapy products to promote calmness and well-being.
